ink-black.$description: Ink Black — Page text, all border rules, signature arch fills — the entire graphical language. The 21:1 contrast against white is the system's only expressive tool

bone-white.$description: Bone White — Canvas, card surfaces, and all negative space — the field against which ink shapes register as architecture

rondelle.$description: Sole typeface for navigation links, body copy, and headings. Used at exactly one weight (400) across the entire site — the flat weight is deliberate; hierarchy is created by jumping from 14px to 30px (a 2.14× ratio) rather than by weight contrast. The custom face has architectural proportions: tall x-height, geometric construction, even stroke — it reads as drawn rather than typed. Substitute with a geometric humanist sans like 'Söhne' or 'Inter' if Rondelle is unavailable.

bone-white-canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Full-page background; the field that receives all ink.

ink-black-surface.$description: Surface level 1: Arch pillars, solid graphic elements — the only non-white surface in the system.
